notes: Canonical service registry for {PROJECT_NAME} v6. Tracks running processes and daemons — not agents (see agent_registry.json). No active services at this time. SA-relative paths throughout.

schema.name: human-readable service name
schema.tailscale_ip: machine tailscale IP at time of registration
schema.start_command: SA-relative path to launch script or command string
events_consumed: event_type strings this service subscribes to
